3221200.name: Silicon Wasteland Demo
3221200.description:
After experiencing a cryptic dream, a lone android awakens to the wind and rain of the quiet apocalypse. Follow Silica, as she assesses her mysterious circumstances in an abandoned warehouse.

This demo contains the Prologue chapter, as well as the first major scene of the main story content of SILICON WASTELAND, a kinetic visual novel set during the twilight years of humanity. Approximate demo completion time: 25 minutes.

Featuring music from the amazing Janice Kwan, as well as additional music by Vidboy.
